---
title: "Hi, I'm Victoria"
subtitle: "Data Scientist · MDS @ UBC"
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-content}

MDS student at UBC with a BSc in Behavioural Neuroscience and 2+ years in population health data management. I bring an interdisciplinary approach to data science rooted in research ethics, health policy, and statistical methodology.

::: {.hero-cta}
[View Full CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[Explore Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg}
:::
:::
:::

---

## Technical Skills {.mt-5}

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-category}
**Languages & Core**
Python · R · SQL · C
:::
::: {.skill-category}
**Data & ML**
pandas · scikit-learn · TensorFlow · numpy
:::
::: {.skill-category}
**Tools & Platforms**
Git · Docker · Jupyter · Tableau · Quarto
:::
::: {.skill-category}
**Languages Spoken**
English (native) · French (B1) · Hungarian (heritage)
:::
:::

---

## Featured Projects {.mt-5}

::: {.grid .featured-projects}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Survival of the Fittest (Model)](https://farkasvic.quarto.pub/survival-of-the-fittest-(model-optimizing-with-genetic-algorithms/)

Genetic algorithms for hyperparameter optimization—a hands-on tutorial comparing GA against Random Search for tuning a Random Forest classifier.

*Quarto · Python · scikit-learn*
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### BizInnovate — Pacific Conference on AI · **1st Place**

ML model predicting regional water quality from geospatial data and satellite imagery.

*Python · Geospatial · ML*
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### nwPlus 2024 Hackathon · **Track Winner**

Digital biomedical waste management system; top 3, Environmental & Sustainability track.

*Hackathon · Full-stack*
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Sports Analytics Datathon · **Semi-Finalist**

Sole programmer; cleaned soccer club datasets to produce a revenue optimization recommendation.

*Python · Data Analysis*
:::
:::

[View all projects →](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .mt-3}

---

## Quick Links {.mt-5}

| | |
|---|---|
| **Email** | [victoriafarkas9@gmail.com](mailto:victoriafarkas9@gmail.com) |
| **LinkedIn** | [linkedin.com/in/victoria-farkas-617262262](https://linkedin.com/in/victoria-farkas-617262262) |
| **Location** | Vancouver, BC |
